overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a rainy night in Night City. The character walks through neon-lit downtown streets, crosses wide intersections with traffic, and passes by various pedestrians and futuristic storefronts with holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk with elevated highway and commercial planters

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked sidewalk beneath an elevated highway structure

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with support pillars spanning across the street
large rectangular planter containing pink flowering trees or bushes
tall building facade covered with bright neon advertisements and holographic displays
yellow utility box and traffic signal pole at street corner

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view walking along a rain-soaked sidewalk beneath an elevated highway. Pink vegetation in concrete planters lines the right side while neon billboards glow in the distance. The wet pavement reflects the vibrant neon lights from surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with towering neon advertisements and skyscrapers

events.description: camera tilts upward to view towering neon signs and holographic billboards on skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: tilting camera up to view the towering neon-lit skyscrapers and floating advertisements overhead

entered.detail: massive vertical neon signs and holographic displays covering building facades
tall structures with rotating holographic product advertisements
suspended digital billboard hanging above the street

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal the dizzying height of surrounding skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements. The perspective emphasizes the verticality of the cyberpunk cityscape before returning to street level at the intersection approach.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide pedestrian crosswalk across multi-lane arterial road

character begins crossing the wide yellow-striped crosswalk with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: waiting at the corner then crossing the wide intersection with a group of pedestrians while vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: black car driving through the intersection with headlights on

black metal railing separating sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: The character waits at a busy intersection as vehicles including a black car drive through. The camera then follows the character across a wide yellow-striped crosswalk, with wet asphalt reflecting the surrounding neon lights and moderate pedestrian traffic moving in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with storefronts and holographic advertisements

events.description: character wearing jacket with glowing red skull emblem passes close to the camera on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the commercial sidewalk passing various pedestrians and storefronts

notable_agents.action: character wearing jacket with glowing red skull emblem walking past the camera

entered.detail: storefront with illuminated 'PRIME' signage in orange neon letters
tall digital display showing rotating advertisements

segments.scene_description: Walking along a commercial sidewalk lined with shops, the character passes by a prominent 'PRIME' storefront and holographic advertising kiosks. A pedestrian wearing a distinctive jacket with a glowing red skull emblem passes closely by on the right. The street features moderate pedestrian traffic moving in opposing directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: street approaching building with prominent purple neon archway entrance

events.description: begins following a character with distinctive green mohawk hairstyle and black tank top
approaching building entrance with large purple neon arch and futuristic statue

agents.ego_description: following a character with green mohawk through crosswalk toward a building with purple neon entrance

notable_agents.action: character with green mohawk and black tank top walking ahead toward the destination

entered.detail: large building entrance framed by vibrant purple neon lighting and geometric arch structure
sculptural decoration with pink lighting near the building entrance
building facade with bright green neon signage

segments.scene_description: The character follows a pedestrian with a distinctive green mohawk through another crosswalk, approaching a building entrance marked by a prominent purple neon archway. A futuristic pink-lit statue stands near the entrance as the camera moves toward the destination, with wet streets continuing to reflect the vibrant neon lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked urban corridor that transitions from the shadow of an elevated highway into a vibrant, neon-drenched commercial district. It begins by walking along a wet sidewalk lined with pink vegetation and glowing billboards, before the camera tilts upward to capture the dizzying verticality of skyscrapers draped in advertisements. As the perspective returns to street level, the camera follows the character across a wide, yellow-striped intersection where vehicles and pedestrians move through reflections of neon light on the asphalt. The scene then shifts toward a commercial strip, passing holographic kiosks and a pedestrian with a glowing red skull emblem, before turning to follow a figure with a green mohawk. Finally, the movement leads toward a building entrance marked by a prominent purple neon archway and a pink-lit statue, with the vibrant city lights continuing to shimmer on the damp pavement.
